summary: Packaging Rules Refactoring testing completed. All core features working: /api/packaging-items removed (returns 404), /api/packaging/rules CRUD works correctly, sales orders correctly deduct packaging products, inventory movements recorded. Backend: 14/14 tests pass. Frontend: All UI features verified working.

minor.issue: Fixed during testing - was returning MongoDB ObjectId causing 500 error. Added rule.pop('_id', None) before returning.

issues: One rule shows 'Unknown' product name - the linked product was deleted but the rule persists. Consider adding cascading delete or validation to remove orphaned rules.

critical_code_review_comments: Packaging routes now correctly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Sales order creation properly deducts both main product and packaging products
Inventory movements recorded for all packaging deductions with clear reason text
Old /packaging-items route correctly redirects to dashboard via catch-all route
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed products, customers, and packaging rules during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Packaging rules refactoring complete. /api/packaging-items endpoint removed. Packaging materials are now regular products in the products collection. Rules link products to their packaging using /api/packaging/rules. Sales orders auto-deduct packaging stock. Test T-Shirt has Courier Bag and Thank You Card as packaging.

Packaging Rules CRUD.GET /api/packaging/rules: PASS - Returns all rules with enriched product details
Packaging Rules CRUD.GET /api/packaging/rules/product/{id}: PASS - Returns rule for specific product
Packaging Rules CRUD.POST /api/packaging/rules: PASS - Creates new packaging rule (after fix)
Packaging Rules CRUD.PUT /api/packaging/rules/{id}: PASS - Updates rule items and active status

Sales Order Packaging Deduction.stock_deduction: PASS - Packaging products correctly deducted when sales order created
Sales Order Packaging Deduction.inventory_movements: PASS - Movements recorded with reason 'Packaging for SO-xxx'

Frontend UI.rules_display: PASS - Shows 2 rules with product names, SKUs, stock levels
Frontend UI.add_rule_modal: PASS - Opens with product select and packaging select dropdowns

bug_fix_applied.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error on POST /api/packaging/rules
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added rule.pop('_id', None) before returning the created rule
